textByHash.6f5f57857e130c261a5fa41fc6e84238ccb5c8c9: My name iz Vlad. I come from far avay, vere the sun iz not so bright.
textByHash.a9c283a7fc8bc5957aecddff262e2c74b06b5812: Just because I can't stand ze smell ov garlic und I don't like bright sunlight doesn't necessarily mean I'm ein vampyre!
textByHash.591f3008db02a178f4a93ba49002982780827c7f: It is vonderful! Ze vomen are beautiful und ze nights are long!
textByHash.cf948c2e090cc8ad66a342828cfaddf772890713: Luck haz notsing to do vith it it is all in ze technique.
textByHash.30ae9dec4671dac72b88da48fcc3575913953eda: My doctor told me to take up ein velaxing hobby. Vhen I am stressed I tend to get ein little..
textByHash.ecf035c755709c168751e1021dc5a0f53f5cb61e: I tsink I may do zat soon...
textByHash.6469f7703bc346bd422a352ba78a3b13f148a5a1: Arrgh! WHAT is that GHASTLY smell??? I think I will move over here instead...
textByHash.1ef1dff1632c1f0bb230c1de182850c8238f6a93: It is vonderful! Ze beautiful und ze nights are long!
textByHash.a90f8f45c90338dabb9cb9b337695fca08fd5107: My doctor told me to take up ein velaxing hobby. Vhen I am stressed I tend to get ein little...
textByHash.3978657779d6ee00c43d4d17e6f24a9684ba6b17: Luck haz notsing to do vith it it iz all in ze technique.
textByHash.43bd52a7e3e960cb81dd7fbf8c727954734f4d33: Uurrggh! Get zat horrible tsing avay from me! How do people like to eat zat stuff? I can't stand even to be near it for tsen zeconds!
